introSection: Candymonium is a steel hyper roller coaster at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and is the centerpiece of a new multi-million dollar entry plaza called Chocolatetown. Opened in 2020, it is the first true candy-themed coaster at the park.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The attraction was announced on October 3, 2018 alongside the new ChocolateTown entrance area.

More info was released on July 24, 2019, including the name Candymonium and that the ride would be tall with a top speed of  and a length of. In November 2019, the tallest point of the ride was topped off. The final piece of track was installed in February 2020.

The ride had its first test run on May 6, 2020.

On June 12, 2020, the park confirmed that the ride would open with the park on July 3.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The park describes this attraction as the "world's sweetest roller coaster". Candymonium is a Hyper Coaster from Bolliger & Mabillard and the flagship attraction of Hersheypark's new entrance area Chocolatetown.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each train on Candymonium is based on a different Hershey brand. There is a Hershey's Kisses train (blue), a Reese's Peanut Butter Cups train (orange), and a Twizzlers train (red).

fullText:
Candymonium is a steel hyper roller coaster at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and is the centerpiece of a new multi-million dollar entry plaza called Chocolatetown. Opened in 2020, it is the first true candy-themed coaster at the park.

The attraction was announced on October 3, 2018 alongside the new ChocolateTown entrance area.

More info was released on July 24, 2019, including the name Candymonium and that the ride would be tall with a top speed of  and a length of. In November 2019, the tallest point of the ride was topped off. The final piece of track was installed in February 2020.

The ride had its first test run on May 6, 2020.

On June 12, 2020, the park confirmed that the ride would open with the park on July 3.

The park describes this attraction as the "world's sweetest roller coaster". Candymonium is a Hyper Coaster from Bolliger & Mabillard and the flagship attraction of Hersheypark's new entrance area Chocolatetown.

Each train on Candymonium is based on a different Hershey brand. There is a Hershey's Kisses train (blue), a Reese's Peanut Butter Cups train (orange), and a Twizzlers train (red).
